what_changed: Removed duplicate name/version/description/authors fields from [tool.poetry] so [project] is the single authoritative package identity source.
Updated package and governance tests to reject duplicate Poetry identity metadata while preserving Poetry-specific package/include configuration.
pr-evidence/poetry-metadata-cleanup/pr-e.why: Poetry 2 accepts the duplicated metadata but emits warnings because [tool.poetry] identity fields are ignored when [project] already defines them. Removing the duplicates keeps Cachet release packaging clean and warning-free.
